skill.name: c4-code
skill.description: C4 code-level documentation guide for analyzing directories, functions, modules, dependencies, and Mermaid relationship diagrams.
skill.summary: Create C4 code-level documentation for directories and modules.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged many high-risk patterns, but review found Markdown examples, Mermaid diagram fences, and documentation placeholders rather than executable code. The only URL is a C4 model reference link, and no prompt injection, data exfiltration, or malicious intent was found.

low_findings.title: False positive: Markdown syntax flagged as command execution
low_findings.description: The cited backticks are Markdown inline code, Mermaid code fences, or diagram examples. They do not instruct the agent to run shell commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The surrounding content is documentation structure and Mermaid examples. No executable script, shell command, or user-controlled command construction is present.

low_findings.title: False positive: Documentation text flagged as weak cryptography
low_findings.description: The cited lines describe code documentation fields and C4 distinctions. No hash function, cipher, cryptographic API, or secret handling is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The matched text appears in prose or placeholders such as description fields. There is no semantic evidence of cryptographic behavior.

low_findings.title: False positive: Diagram labels flagged as reconnaissance
low_findings.description: The cited lines are Mermaid diagram labels or documentation instructions about code structure. They do not collect host, filesystem, or environment information.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The terms appear inside explanatory Markdown and diagrams. They are examples for documentation output, not commands or discovery logic.

low_findings.title: Benign external reference link
low_findings.description: The C4 model URL is a documentation reference link. It is not a network request, webhook, download command, or exfiltration endpoint.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URL appears in a note that cites the C4 model. No code path uses the URL to transmit or retrieve data.

content.value_statement: Teams often lack precise documentation for functions, modules, and local dependencies. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code to create structured C4 code-level documentation.
actual_capabilities: Guides documentation for a selected directory or module.
Structures function and method details with signatures, locations, and dependencies.
Documents classes, modules, interfaces, and internal relationships.
Recommends Mermaid diagram types for object-oriented, functional, procedural, and mixed code.
Compares C4 code-level documentation with component, container, and context views.
limitations: It is a Markdown guide, not an automated parser or documentation generator.
It cannot verify source code unless the assistant has access to the target repository.
It references an implementation playbook that is not included in this package.
It focuses on code-level C4 documentation, not system context or deployment architecture.

use_cases.title: Document a Service Directory
use_cases.description: Create C4 code-level documentation for service classes, exported functions, and internal dependencies.

use_cases.title: Map Functional Pipelines
use_cases.description: Describe data transformation functions, pipeline order, validation steps, and Mermaid flowcharts.

use_cases.title: Prepare Architecture Handoff Notes
use_cases.description: Summarize code elements and relationships before onboarding, refactoring, or architecture review.

prompt_templates.title: Start Directory Documentation
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the selected directory and create C4 code-level documentation with functions, classes, dependencies, and source locations.

prompt_templates.title: Document Functions and Modules
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for procedural or functional code.
prompt_templates.prompt: Document each exported function and module in this package. Include signatures, purpose, callers, dependencies, and a concise relationship diagram.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Diagram Options
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for mixed code styles.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this mixed codebase and choose the best Mermaid diagram type for each area. Explain why each diagram fits the code structure.

prompt_templates.title: Create Review-Ready C4 Notes
prompt_templates.prompt: Produce review-ready C4 code documentation for this module. Highlight public APIs, internal coupling, external dependencies, and unclear ownership boundaries.

output_examples.output: A structured C4 code-level document with service classes, public methods, dependencies, source locations, and a relationship diagram summary.

output_examples.input: Create documentation for a functional ETL pipeline.
output_examples.output: A pipeline-focused description that lists each transformation, validation step, input, output, and data flow relationship.

output_examples.input: Explain how repository classes depend on interfaces.
output_examples.output: A class-oriented documentation section that names interfaces, implementations, method responsibilities, and dependency relationships.

best_practices: Provide the exact directory or module before requesting documentation.
Ask for source locations so readers can verify each documented element.
Use Mermaid diagrams only when relationships are complex enough to need visuals.
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for high-level system context diagrams only.
Do not document guessed functions that are not present in the codebase.
Do not create large diagrams when a short dependency list is clearer.

faq.question: What does this skill document?
faq.answer: It documents code-level C4 details such as functions, classes, modules, dependencies, and internal relationships.

faq.question: Does it generate documentation automatically?
faq.answer: No. It guides the assistant to inspect available code and produce structured documentation.

faq.question: Which diagram format does it recommend?
faq.answer: It recommends Mermaid class diagrams or flowcharts based on the code style and relationship type.

faq.question: Can it document functional programming code?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes guidance for modules, pure functions, pipelines, and function dependency graphs.

faq.question: Is this for C4 component diagrams?
faq.answer: No. It focuses on code-level details inside a component or directory.

faq.question: What input should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide the target directory, documentation goals, preferred detail level, and any important architecture constraints.
